title: Mamba MVP release-gate summary
description: Stable JSON schema for release-gate summaries emitted by the MVP release runner (#2821). Closes #2820 / parent #2775. The schema lives next to the per-profile manifests under projects/mamba/validation/ so workers can resolve both from one root.

schema_version.description: Major version of this schema. Bump only on breaking changes; workers MUST refuse summaries with an unknown major.

release_id.description: Stable identifier for this release attempt — typically a commit SHA or mamba version tag.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the summary was produced.

cpython.description: CPython major.minor as reported by `python3 -V`. The performance profile fails this entire summary if the value does not match `[runtime_identity].required_cpython` in performance.toml.

mamba_edition.description: Mamba runtime edition tag — must match `[runtime_identity].required_mamba_edition` in performance.toml.

pass.description: True iff every release-required profile passed and no blocker is unresolved.

blocking_failure_count.description: Number of failures across release-required profiles. A non-zero value MUST set `pass` to false.

release_required_profiles.description: Profile ids whose failure blocks the release (e.g. smoke, correctness, performance, ecosystem, package_manager, mambalibs).

report_only_profiles.description: Profile ids whose failure is reported but never blocks.

profiles.description: Per-profile rollup keyed by profile id (matches the file stem under projects/mamba/validation/profiles/).

profile.description: Profile id; must equal the parent key.

command.description: Shell command the runner invoked for this profile.

status.description: Profile-level outcome. `skip` is only legal for report-only profiles.

blocking.description: True iff this profile is release-required.

blockers_by_objective.description: Acceptance: "Summary groups blockers by MVP objective." Keys are MVP objective ids (smoke, correctness, performance, ecosystem, package_manager, mambalibs, release_gate); values are arrays of blocker entries surfacing the failing fixture, profile, and tracking issue.

tracking_issue.description: GitHub issue number or url; null when there is no tracker yet.

summary_path.description: Filesystem path of this very summary file once written.
